when_to_use: Accepting Troy and Visa cards for Turkish e-commerce
Installment plan checkout for Turkish consumer purchases

review.verdict: Cost-effective Turkish gateway with installment support, but iyzico has better DX and English docs.
review.best_for: Turkish e-commerce wanting installments and local Troy card support at low cost
review.not_for: Non-Turkish teams needing English-first docs and support
